'''Welinarro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who worked as the squadron commander of a small [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] contingent of [[Nwarcol Point]].

He was a former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and the son of [[Grisserno]], the hero of the [[Battle of Denab]].
